programme.title: The Feast of Fools
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, life may be tough, but having fun is also on the agenda! Folly Festival is a carnival where everyone sings and dances, but also has fun trading places. Howler becomes a princess for the day, and Little Lewis a lord.

programme.title: San Diego
programme.desc: In sunny San Diego: Beach volleyball lesson with local teens, paragliding at Torrey Pines Glider Port, flow riding at Wavehouse, and Olympic archery lessons. A week of thrilling sports and diverse experiences!

programme.title: The Aral Sea
programme.desc: Kit is rusting in the toxic desert of the former Aral Sea.

programme.title: Crunchy Crystals
programme.desc: Eric learns that although it can take millions of years to make one crystal, he can make some in just a week with an easy experiment. His new crystals taste good, too.

programme.title: Solid as a Liquid
programme.desc: Eric learns that although all matter in the universe exists in three main states – solid, liquid and gas – it's also possible to create a liquid that acts like a solid. He does an experiment to create this substance, called Oobleck.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Rabbit
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Rabbit. Rabbit used to be a magicians assistant but never finished her final performance.

programme.title: Our Solar System: Fact and Fiction
programme.desc: Why does Neptune appear blue? Which moons might harbor life? Host Emily Calandrelli speaks with two experts about each planet in our solar system and uncovers some misconceptions about the nature of space.

programme.title: Solid as a Liquid
programme.desc: Eric learns that although all matter in the universe exists in three main states – solid, liquid and gas – it's also possible to create a liquid that acts like a solid. He does an experiment to create this substance, called Oobleck.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: Robbie and Flippy fall out over some fireworks Robbie has bought. With Robbie covered in white powder from an accidental explosion, and Flippy pretending he doesn't exist, Albert is convinced Robbie is a ghost that only he can see.

programme.title: Kite Shenanigans
programme.desc: Eric builds a new kite. He makes sure it is symmetrical – both sides are exactly the same – as that helps kites fly and stay balanced in the air. He learns that there are lots of different types of kites but they all need the wind to fly.

programme.title: Multiple applications of Magnets
programme.desc: How did people know where they were heading before GPS? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of magnetism. Have hands-on fun by constructing your own compass, and get to know An Wang, a computer engineer who revolutionised magnetic core memory.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Curious Coin
programme.desc: Addison and Alex dig up what they think is an Ancient Roman coin in the community garden – then have a mystery to solve when it unexpectedly disappears.

programme.title: Scooped!
programme.desc: When Addison and her classmates get a school assignment to write about local news – and the news is that laundry is going missing from balconies around Ayrton Park – Addison turns into investigative reporter to crack the case and get a scoop.

programme.title: Doki and Ducki
programme.desc: Doki stumbles upon a newly hatched duckling. To Doki's surprise, the duckling follows him! It seems like ‘Ducki' has mistakenly imprinted on Doki and thinks he's his mama! To set things right, half the team heads off to search lake Weewannanoh for the mother.

programme.title: The Feast of Fools
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, life may be tough, but having fun is also on the agenda! Folly Festival is a carnival where everyone sings and dances, but also has fun trading places. Howler becomes a princess for the day, and Little Lewis a lord.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Robot Rivalry
programme.desc: Addison's excitement at bringing Eureka and Gyro in for a show and tell at school turns to consternation when Donnie turns up with a robot that can do everything hers can do – only better! There has to be a sneaky mystery involved, and Addison is determined to solve it!

programme.title: The Water Cycle
programme.desc: Overheated, Kit loses consciousness and embarks on a strange dream journey around the world.

programme.title: Trip to Myanmar
programme.desc: During a football game, Milo rips his pants. Alim suggests a skirt, but Milo, backed by Zoe, refuses-skirts are for girls! To change their minds, Alim takes them to Myanmar, where they meet Seng, who introduces them to the 'longyi,' a traditional garment worn by all.

programme.title: I'm Like a Bird
programme.desc: Tortoise's day turns silly when his shell gets a puncture and goes floppy! While trying to escape it, he knocks an egg from its nest. Determined to help, Tortoise sets off to return the egg-discovering his squishy shell can be surprisingly useful.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: The Water Cycle
programme.desc: Overheated, Kit loses consciousness and embarks on a strange dream journey around the world.

programme.title: It's Gala Day
programme.desc: It's the day of the gala. As the crowds arrive, there's drama backstage. Will Ella fix her costume in time for her big debut with Adriano? Will Kloe keep her nerves under control and nail her Hungarian performance? A surprising performance leaves everyone speechless.

programme.title: Trip to Myanmar
programme.desc: During a football game, Milo rips his pants. Alim suggests a skirt, but Milo, backed by Zoe, refuses-skirts are for girls! To change their minds, Alim takes them to Myanmar, where they meet Seng, who introduces them to the 'longyi,' a traditional garment worn by all.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Robot Rivalry
programme.desc: Addison's excitement at bringing Eureka and Gyro in for a show and tell at school turns to consternation when Donnie turns up with a robot that can do everything hers can do – only better! There has to be a sneaky mystery involved, and Addison is determined to solve it!

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Multiple applications of Magnets
programme.desc: How did people know where they were heading before GPS? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of magnetism. Have hands-on fun by constructing your own compass, and get to know An Wang, a computer engineer who revolutionised magnetic core memory.

programme.title: Solid as a Liquid
programme.desc: Eric learns that although all matter in the universe exists in three main states – solid, liquid and gas – it's also possible to create a liquid that acts like a solid. He does an experiment to create this substance, called Oobleck.

programme.title: Kite Shenanigans
programme.desc: Eric builds a new kite. He makes sure it is symmetrical – both sides are exactly the same – as that helps kites fly and stay balanced in the air. He learns that there are lots of different types of kites but they all need the wind to fly.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

E5 - Avocado

programme.desc: Supertato is out chasing a milkshake robot and leaves Broccoli in charge of Tato Tower. Evil Pea tries to take over the tower, but Broccoli puts on a great defence.

programme.title: E18 - Plane
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'plane' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We explore a flying plane, a landing plane, a fast plane and even meeting a sneezing plane!

programme.title: E8 - The Monster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: E1 - Cool, Man
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: E7 - Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: E8 - Curry Quest
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: E16 - The Medicine Badge
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: E12 - I Always Wanted To Be A Crab
programme.desc: The talking animals talk about all the things they love about the ocean.

programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.desc: The squirrels go to see what Duggee is doing but on the way Tag stumbles on some toy blocks and hurts his knee. How can they make him feel better? Happy's mum says laughter is the best medicine.

programme.title: E43 - Pea Repeats
programme.desc: Supertato is due to receive the Best Hero Award, but Evil Pea decides she should get it. Carrot tells her she needs to defeat herself to win the award.

programme.title: E10 - The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: E9 - Magic
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: E16 - The Medicine Badge
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: E2 - When Cute Creatures Cause Big Chaos!
programme.desc: Watch out, because these cute creatures are causing big chaos! First, Chroma the Magic Pet has a cold, & every time she sneezes, she causes a huge color splat! Mila & Morphle must find her before the whole city is covered in color. Then, the Baby Morphles arrive from another dimension & they are in the mood for a game of chase! From a giant living doll to a runaway magic pet, these cute creatures are causing chaos everywhere!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E1 - Let's Play All The Best Games!
programme.desc: It's time to play all the best games with Kii & Yii! The fun begins with a high-stakes game of Red Light, Green Light, where Jeepbot is 'It' with a slime cannon blaster! Then, Kii & Yii play a fun game of life-size Snakes & Ladders, complete with toy snakes & big ladders. The competition continues with a game of Duck, Duck, Goose in mini race cars & a summer pool party game of Marco Polo with Snappy Croc!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster Becomes a Superhero!
programme.desc: Watch as Buster becomes a real-life superhero! When a storm starts during a nature walk, everyone panics, but it's up to brave Buster to lead them all safely home through the rain & wind. Then, Buster wants to be an emergency vehicle. He gets his chance to be a hero when he's guarding the fire station & a fire breaks out! It's up to Buster the hero fire truck to save the day. From flying like Super Buster to rescuing a kitten, he's always a hero!

programme.title: E5 - A Super Creative Day of Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E7 - Hardboiled
programme.desc: Torres receives intel from a confidential informant regarding top secret naval information that's at risk of being sold.

programme.title: E9 - Humbug
programme.desc: When a shocking tell-all threatens to ruin Christmas for a decorated Marine, NCIS must unwrap the truth and deliver a holiday miracle -- before the book hits shelves and turns a hero's legacy into a holiday disaster.

programme.title: E10 - Baker's Man
programme.desc: After NCIS learns that the owner of Parker's favorite bakery is being blackmailed, they hatch a plan to save her.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: The remaining chefs butcher and break down various cuts of beef amongst their teams to create sizzling steak dishes; two contestants face elimination as they enter a heated seafood cook-off.

programme.title: E9 - You Wanna Pizza Me?
programme.desc: The 10 remaining contestants step into the kitchen with the goal of elevating the traditional pizza into a next-level masterpiece; the winning pizza gains immunity for the whole team and claims the top-level kitchen spot.

programme.title: Pretty Cheaters, Deadly Lies
programme.desc: After being tricked into a compromising situation, high school senior Hannah Fletcher thinks she can stop her cousin Madison's blackmail by taking her college entrance exam for her. But nothing is enough for Madison, and her plans soon become deadly...

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.desc: PHOENIX EVENING EXPRESS: Phoenix Evening Express reports world events with in-depth coverage of the latest social, economic, cultural and sports news from Mainland China, Taiwan and Hong Kong.

programme.title: Chief Editor's Time
programme.desc: Chief Editor's Time: Daily key issues around the world are discussed on Chief Editor's Time. In-depth analyses and discussion gives viewers a better understanding of the issue.

programme.title: E7 - Aboriginal Voices
programme.desc: Leaders and representatives of Aboriginal communities show Zac and Darin how Indigenous cultures live to protect and preserve the land.

programme.title: E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: E5 - Missing Home
programme.desc: Sarah visits the laundry district of Dhobi Ghat, one of the world's largest outdoor laundries. Further setbacks at the restaurant and the furious pace of Mumbai are beginning to wear Sarah down as the opening night gets closer.

programme.title: E6 - Hurricane Lester
programme.desc: A Houston area school teacher, who lost almost everything in Hurricane Harvey, sets out with Bear Grylls to face a different side of Mother Nature. Along the way, Lester is put to the test, but proves that no challenge is too tough for his unbreakable spirit.

programme.title: E6 - Capturing the Wild
programme.desc: Conservationists employ sophisticated tactics to capture kudu, impala, and giraffe.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: The students learn about life and death on the farm as baby crocodiles hatch in their hands and they have to kill an adult. Repeated fumbling in roping practice leaves John livid with everyone and Lyn’s frustration with diminutive Renee reaches boiling point.

programme.title: Final Justice
programme.desc: Cheung Tit-hong has recorded numerous meritorious deeds, but he is by nature uncontrollable and antagonistic to his bureaucratic superiors. Before reporting his work to his superiors, he has already successfully arrested the gangsters who steal motorbikes. He also saved an innocent teacher from being wrongly accused of theft by recognizing a female pickpocket. Finally, he has subdued fierce armed robbers in the gambling casino by flexibly utilizing a car thief, Boy. The contradictions in working style between Cheung and his superiors naturally lead to numerous scenes of strong conflicts...

programme.title: Freedom Run
programme.desc: Te-pei sets up an Angel's Dust scan but finds himself trapped by Hong Kong police led by Chang. They are ordered to cooperate to crack the narcotize ring and suspect rich Chen as the kingpin. This leads to a Yunan martial arts troupe. Chang falls in love with the troupe's star, Hung. Police raid the troupe but find nothing as Hung has unwittingly taken the narcotics. She wants to smuggle herself to America, only to find herself chased by police and traffickers...

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: E15 - Looking Back And Far Beyond
programme.desc: Dr. Travis Taylor relives the most shocking and compelling phenomena that have taken place in the past year on Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: E2 - Opportunity Cost
programme.desc: As five new survivalists begin their first days in the Mackenzie River Delta, they are met with an abundance of challenges in the uncharted Arctic terrain.

programme.title: E3 - Let Them Bake Cake
programme.desc: During the mid-20th century, two unlikely characters find themselves in competition to simplify the lives of homemakers across the country by creating a tasty but easy boxed cake mix.

programme.title: E4 - Soda Rising: Birth Of Pop
programme.desc: In the late 1800s, two pharmacists 1500 miles apart race to create healthy, non-alcoholic beverage options, kickstarting the entire soda industry with their breakout hits: Hires Root Beer and Dr. Pepper.

programme.title: E20 - Wonders Of The Ancient World
programme.desc: Remarkable feats of engineering from our ancient past span the globe. Some are amazing in size. Others in sophistication. Some are so strange they border on inexplicable.

programme.title: E4 - Soda Rising: Birth Of Pop
programme.desc: In the late 1800s, two pharmacists 1500 miles apart race to create healthy, non-alcoholic beverage options, kickstarting the entire soda industry with their breakout hits: Hires Root Beer and Dr. Pepper.

programme.desc: As five new survivalists begin their first days in the Mackenzie River Delta, they are met with an abundance of challenges in the uncharted Arctic terrain.

programme.desc: During the mid-20th century, two unlikely characters find themselves in competition to simplify the lives of homemakers across the country by creating a tasty but easy boxed cake mix.

WE 12
programme.desc: In the world, which is ordinary yet a little bit extraordinary, there is an underground organization called the 'The League of Kaito'. Their members silently guard the social order and peace. Within the organization, there are 12 geniuses, each with their own unique skills. Kaito Ian is good at planning, Kaito KT is a master of hypnosis, Kaito Stanley is skilled in eavesdropping, Kaito A.Lo is most adaptable, Kaito Edan is excellent in abseiling, Kaito Jer can instantly disguise himself, Kaito Tiger knows how to read lips from a distance, Kaito Alton is a world-class hacker, Kaito AK masters animal telepathy, Kaito Lokman is familiar with unlocking techniques, Kaito Frankie has the strongest sixth sense, and Kaito Jeremy has a natural super memory and can read and memorize large amounts of information at a glance. They are the star members of the League of Kaito. One day, they received instructions from Boss, to gather at headquarters to complete an important case that will a

programme.title: Dot 2 Dot
programme.desc: Chung returns from Canada to a drastically transformed Hong Kong and hoping to capture the city in his childhood years, graffitis a cryptic diagram near every subway station, in the form of dot-to-dot games. Soon they are discovered by Xue, a Putonghua teacher from China determined to solve these riddles as she immerses herself in our city's culture and history...

programme.title: Thunderstruck Cop
programme.desc: One day, Hyun-joon, a policeman who lives with his mother and his daughter, attains a superpower after getting struck by the lightning. After the incident, Hyun-joon realizes that there are others who have been going through the same situation with him, and gets involved with unexpected situations. Will he be able to succeed both, as a father who struggles with the relationship with his daughter, and as a cop with a superpower who is eager to catch an evil criminal?

programme.title: Hong Kong Film Awards Preview: My First Of May
programme.desc: My First of May follows TANG Suk Yin and his daughter TANG Chi, whose lives are turned upside down when Chi is diagnosed with a serious illness, given little chance to survive past two. Faced with this heart-wrenching reality, Suk Yin and his wife, Elaine YEUNG, promise to cherish every moment with Chi. Miraculously, Chi survives beyond two, but this brings significant changes. The couple sacrifices their dreams to care for her-Suk Yin gives up his squash career, while Elaine, overwhelmed by pressure, abandons the family. In despair, Suk Yin withdraws and becomes a recluse. Without parental support, Chi relies on her grandmother, SUEN Yau Mui. When her grandmother's health deteriorates, Suk Yin can no longer ignore his responsibilities and returns home. After years apart, how will they mend their strained relationships? Unexpectedly, a small understanding from the past helps them reconnect. With Suk Yin's support, Chi gains movement in her ring finger, rekindling love in the

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.desc: Discover just how many cheesecakes 15 tons of cream cheese will make; how to make 500,000 perogies a day and not sacrifice quality; why for ice cream sandwiches, human touch is crucial; and what 1 million jars of marmalade and Formula One racing have in common.

programme.desc: Discover how Campbell's spells out the letters for perfect soup; why Razzles need a lot of pressure to become sweet candy gum; how beer becomes fine Canadian whiskey; and why dry ice is crucial to making sweet and sticky brioche.

programme.desc: Discover why nimble fingers are crucial in making perfect spanikopita; why less friction makes ginger snaps healthier; how a universally loved Sicilian dessert started with one family; and what adds a whole year of shelf life to a box of sweet apple juice.

programme.title: Homo Plasticus - The Plastic Inside Us
programme.desc: All organisms harbor an invisible, omnipresent enemy: plastic. Researchers worldwide have shown that plastic particles can also be detected in humans - in organs and bodily fluids.

programme.title: How Europe Is Replacing China And The US
programme.desc: After decades of stalled talks, Europe has reached a trade turning point: It's been on a deal signing spree, inking mammoth pacts with major powers like India, Indonesia, Australia, Brazil and Argentina. This is a story about how the world recalibrates when the US goes rogue, and the race to rely less on China.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.desc: 全新互動音樂節目，以「星素結合」的形式全民共唱。100位素人歌手將通過現場K歌贏得機會成為三位幸運歌手，與每集的大咖歌手進行合唱挑戰，實現自己的夢想。大咖歌手嘉賓包括孫楠、羽泉等。

programme.title: E13 - 不要在錯的時間遇見對的人
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。
